notes:
vMLX 1.6.7

Paged KV cache defaults ON for autodetected text families (dense + hybrid-SSM: Qwen3.5/3.6, Zaya, Nemotron-H, LFM2.5, Laguna, Hy3, Step-3.7) with full Electron panel parity (visible toggle == launch flag == engine policy). MLLM/VL and MiniMax-M3/openPangu-v2/Gemma4 keep their own cache paths; DeepSeek-V4 keeps its composite opt-in. Reasoning defaults ON for reasoning-capable families (family guards remain authoritative).

Fixed:
- Never-empty answer after runaway reasoning across chat and /v1/responses (qwen3.5/3.6, DeepSeek-V4, Step-3.7, MiniMax); answer pass runs a fresh context for deepseek_v4/step3p7 with no reasoning/think re-entry leak.
- MLLM/VL paged cache now honors the same RAM byte ceiling as the text path (--cache-memory-mb/percent); verified live (Step-3.7 flat at +0.27 GB RSS over an 18-turn multiturn).
- Memory-cache lock inversion (#233 deadlock), stop_token_ids crash, lockless cache-clear race; paged RAM byte-ceiling eviction and disk-L2 off-by-one.
- Loaded MLLM /v1/completions routed through the chat rail (fixes VL constant-token degeneration); gpt_oss harmony no longer leaks into visible content; Laguna glm47 tool parser; ZAYA zaya_xml pin; truthful capabilities + launch RAM estimate.

Verification: full Python suite A/B'd against v1.6.6 — zero new failures. Both DMGs Developer ID signed (team 55KGF2S5AY), Apple notarized, stapled, Gatekeeper accepted.

Flavors: sequoia (macosx_14 wheels; Sonoma 14.5+, Sequoia, Tahoe) and tahoe (native macosx_26 wheels; Tahoe only).
